title: Adding Monday Guests - Error Message showing
excerpt: Hi- we have added a few guests today to one of our workspace boards. Things were going smoothly until about an hour ago when we started receiving the message “Something went wrong while subscribing the user” - Have teste…

posts.author: lucasleigh (Lucas Leigh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi- we have added a few guests today to one of our workspace boards. Things were going smoothly until about an hour ago when we started receiving the message “Something went wrong while subscribing the user” - Have tested in 3 different locations and all 3 of us are receiving the same error message. We are on the Enterprise Bronze account. Thanks for any status update, maybe it’s a system-wide issue.

posts.author: lucasleigh (Lucas Leigh)
posts.cookedHtml: Whatever was happening appears to be fixed now!

posts.author: ZTowner12 (Zack Towner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Lucas.

Do you remember what you did to fix this?

Thanks

  • Zack
